name: webnotes-builder
description: Converts course material (PDF slides, markdown, txt, images, past exams, assignments) into a complete interactive HTML study site. Two goal modes: PASS (mines past-exam patterns, builds an exam-prep page with model answers as the centerpiece, teaches only what's needed to pass) and MASTER (full-fidelity coverage of all material). Chunked multi-session workflow with state persistence, content-fidelity guarantees, mandatory reviewer pass, and multi-agent orchestration (exam-miner / chapter-writer / reviewer subagents).
